content: Database examples  Table of contents Database creation Database creation code body common control { bundlesequence => { "dummy" }; } body knowledge control { #sql_database => "postgres"; sql_owner => "postgres" ; sql_passwd => "" ; # No passwd sql_type => "postgres" ; } bundle knowledge dummy { topics : } body common control { bundlesequence => { "databases" }; } bundle agent databases { #commands: # "/usr/bin/createdb cf_topic_maps", # contain => as_user("mysql"); databases : "knowledge_bank/topics" database_operation => "create" , database_type => "sql" , database_columns => { "topic_name,varchar,256" , "topic_comment,varchar,1024" , "topic_id,varchar,256" , "topic_type,varchar,256" , "topic_extra,varchar,26" }, database_server => myserver ; } body database_server myserver { none :: db_server_owner => "postgres" ; db_server_password => "" ; db_server_host => "localhost" ; db_server_type => "postgres" ; db_server_connection_db => "postgres" ; any :: db_server_owner => "root" ; db_server_password => "" ; db_server_host => "localhost" ; db_server_type => "mysql" ; db_server_connection_db => "mysql" ; } body contain as_user ( x ) { exec_owner => " $(x) " ; }
